query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ad_report_files (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  brandId INT NOT NULL,
  fileName VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
  fileUrl TEXT NOT NULL,
  fileKey VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
  fileType VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  fileSize INT,
  analysisStatus ENUM('pending', 'processing', 'completed', 'failed') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  analysisResult JSON,
  detectedLanguage VARCHAR(10),
  campaignId INT,
  uploadedBy INT NOT NULL,
  uploadedByName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ad_report_files (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  brandId INT NOT NULL,
  fileName VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
  fileUrl TEXT NOT NULL,
  fileKey VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
  fileType VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  fileSize INT,
  analysisStatus ENUM('pending', 'processing', 'completed', 'failed') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  analysisResult JSON,
  detectedLanguage VARCHAR(10),
  campaignId INT,
  uploadedBy INT NOT NULL,
  uploadedByName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
